data.title: Saudi Arabia's home energy management system market set to reach $145.69M by 2033 from $43.62M in 2024, with 14.34% CAGR. Energy efficiency, IoT, and gov't initiatives driving growth.
data.description: A report titled "Saudi Arabia Home Energy Management System Market Overview 2025-2033" has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. It projects that the Saudi Arabia Home Energy Management System Market is set to grow to US$ 145.69 million by 2033, up from US$ 43.62 million in 2024, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 14.34% from 2025 to 2033. This growth is attributed to global focus on energy efficiency, the increasing adoption of smart homes and Internet of Things (IoT) technologies, as well as government initiatives promoting sustainable lifestyles.

data.title: Andersen Consulting partners with Virtual, Inc in a collaboration agreement in San Francisco. #AndersenConsulting #VirtualInc
data.description: In San Francisco, Andersen Consulting has revealed a new Collaboration Agreement with Virtual, Inc., an American company. This agreement is set to facilitate joint projects and initiatives between the two firms.

data.title: CrashPlan showcases cyber resiliency, data protection, and recovery for Microsoft 365 at TechCon 365 Atlanta.
data.description: A demonstration will be held by CrashPlan in Minneapolis, showcasing their Azure-focused solutions for cyber resiliency, data protection, quick recovery, and compliance specifically tailored for Microsoft 365. The event, TechCon 365 Atlanta, will be the platform for this demo presentation.

data.title: TeamDynamix named a 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ Strong Performer for IT Service Management.
data.description: A company based in Columbus, Ohio, known as TeamDynamix, has recently been acknowledged as a Strong Performer for IT Service Management Platforms in the 2025 Gartner® Peer Insights™ report. This recognition highlights the company's excellence in providing IT services.

data.title: Dynatrace (NYSE: DT) named Leader and Outperformer in GigaOm Radar Report for Kubernetes Observability, evaluated among 23 solutions.
data.description: In Boston, Dynatrace (NYSE: DT) has been recognized as a Leader and Outperformer in the 2025 GigaOm Radar Report for Kubernetes Observability. Among 23 top Kubernetes observability solutions assessed, Dynatrace stood out in categories such as scalability, ease of use, compliance, cost, ecosystem, and flexibility. This acknowledgment highlights Dynatrace's capability to deliver exceptional performance to customers in the industry.

data.title: Ethereum surpasses Solana in capital with $4K target looming, leading in futures dominance as well.
data.description: Ether has surpassed both Solana and Bitcoin in terms of capital inflows and dominance in futures trading. This surge in popularity comes as experts predict a potential retest of the $4,000 mark for Ether.

data.title: Trump plans to permit crypto in 401(k) plans for US workers. Executive order pending, says White House.
data.description: The White House Press Office has verified to Cointelegraph that President Trump will be signing an executive order permitting exposure to cryptocurrency in American 401(k) retirement plans.

data.title: H&R Block appoints new Senior VP and CTO, SVP for Ops & Tech to accelerate financial services transformation.
data.description: On August 7, 2025, in Kansas City, Missouri, H&R Block, Inc. shared the appointment of leadership positions. Jason Lenhart was named Senior Vice President and Chief Technology Officer, while Monika Mehrotra was appointed as Senior Vice President for Operations & Technology. This move is aimed at driving the company's progress and enhancing its financial services. H&R Block is known for its role as a top provider of global tax preparation, financial products, and small business solutions, boasting a 70-year history of enabling financial freedom for clients through a blend of trust and technology.

data.title: Merit Medical launches Prelude Wave Hydrophilic Sheath Introducer with SnapFix Technology for radial access, aiding in reducing arterial spasm and occlusion.
data.description: A novel thin-wall design featuring advanced insertion technique and a distinct sheath-securement solution has been developed to enhance radial access procedures. This innovation is aimed at minimizing arterial spasm and occlusion, potentially improving success rates during procedures.

data.title: US Army Corps of Engineers selects GreenGen for $3B program to enhance energy resilience of federal facilities.
data.description: A performance-based Energy Savings Performance Contracting (ESPC) model is being utilized to upgrade government buildings with private funding, eliminating the need for initial expenses. GreenGen, headquartered in Bethesda, Maryland, disclosed on August 7, 2025, its selection as one of the companies chosen by the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (USACE) Engineering and Support Center for a project. This initiative aims to modernize facilities without upfront costs, demonstrating the viability of public-private partnerships in enhancing infrastructure.

data.title: Yello partners with CodeSignal to enhance candidate selection process for early talent teams. #Chicago #Aug72025 #PRNewswire
data.description: In Chicago on August 7, 2025, Yello, a prominent company specializing in early talent acquisition software, revealed a new collaboration with CodeSignal, an innovative platform for AI-driven skills assessment and experiential learning. This partnership is particularly noteworthy as CodeSignal already partners with a significant number of leading employers.

data.title: Dow Jones rises on Trump tariff news; Eli Lilly plunges on weight-loss drug trial results. Apple, Nvidia rally.
data.description: The Dow Jones Index saw a rise on Thursday following news on Trump's tariffs. Eli Lilly experienced a significant drop after disappointing results in a weight-loss drug trial. The stock market displayed positive movement with Dow futures increasing. Apple and Nvidia stocks rallied, contrasting with Eli Lilly's plunge. This information is live coverage and was not sourced from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Unemployment claims rise, hinting at weakening job market. Initial claims hit 226,000 — above expectations, raising concerns for the Fed's interest rate decisions and economic recovery.
data.description: After a consistent decline in weekly jobless claims for over a month, concerns are surfacing with a recent uptick in unemployment numbers following a disappointing jobs report. The rise to 226,000 initial jobless claims is slightly above expectations, warranting attention as it could signal a new wave of layoffs. This may pressure the Federal Reserve into a challenging decision on interest rates. The VOO ETF is surpassing resistance levels, indicating market shifts. Inflation and business surveys show price pressures escalating at the close of the second quarter and likely continuing into July, posing a threat to the Fed's goal of 2% inflation and maximum employment. These updates hint potential economic complexities.

data.title: Energy Vault acquires 125 MW/1,000 MWh Stoney Creek BESS in Australia after receiving FIRB approval. Expands international "Own & Operate" portfolio.
data.description: Energy Vault Holdings, Inc. has recently acquired the Stoney Creek Battery Energy Storage System (BESS) project in Northern New South Wales after receiving Foreign Investment Review Board (FIRB) approval. The project, with a capacity of 125 MW/1,000 MWh, is now part of Energy Vault’s international portfolio for ownership and operation. This acquisition marks a significant expansion for the global leader in grid-scale energy storage solutions, Energy Vault (NYSE: NRGV).
